blocks.text: The Studex Group
Studex is a South African luxury food and commodities group — built to compete globally. We own the supply chain from farm to customer, powered by AI agents running 24/7 on virtual machines.

Our core belief: the future of business is agentic. Autonomous agents running around the clock, coordinated by a CEO agent that reports to a human founder. Tumelo Ramaphosa sets the vision, builds relationships, and closes the deals. The agents handle everything else.
"Every CEO needs a founder who believes." — Tumelo Ramaphosa, Founder
Our Businesses

rows: Premium coffee export — Rwanda, Ethiopia, Kenya, Uganda, SA
Russian caviar import — luxury SA market
Open-core development environment for SA tech

blocks.text: Our Story — 10 Years of Premium Craft

Ten years ago, Tumelo Ramaphosa set out to build South Africa's most trusted premium meat brand — one built on integrity, halal integrity, and the belief that Black-owned South African businesses could compete at the highest level.

From those first Wagyu biltong batches from Moutloe Farm to today's nationwide operation, Studex has stayed true to one principle: your clients deserve to know exactly where their meat comes from — every single time.

Today, Studex Meat serves clients across South Africa — from families wanting the finest biltong for their Sunday braai, to corporate clients seeking premium gift boxes that represent South African quality at its absolute best.
"Our 100% halal commitment is non-negotiable. Every supplier, every product, every time — verified and certified." — Tumelo Ramaphosa, Founder
Milestones
2016 — Studex founded. First premium meat batches sourced from Moutloe Farm.
2019 — Halaal certification achieved. First Black-owned halal premium brand in SA.
2022 — Farm network expanded to 3 verified suppliers. Nationwide delivery launched.
2024 — AI operations launched. Charlie, Naledi & Delivery Agent running 24/7.
2026 — Studex positioned as SA's leading farm-to-door premium commodities group.
Wagyu Biltong Gold
Our Flagship Product

A5 Wagyu beef from Moutloe Farm. Dry-aged for 21 days under controlled conditions — then slow-cured in the traditional South African biltong style. Japanese genetics. South African craft. No equal in the world.

rows: A5 Wagyu — Japanese genetics, dry-aged 21 days

Full farm-to-door traceability on every package

Why Clients Choose Studex
10 Years of Craft — A decade building relationships with SA's finest farms. Experience you can taste.
100% Halaal Certified — Every supplier and product is fully halal certified. Verified, documented, accountable.
Premium Heritage Breeds — Wagyu, Ankole, Spring Lamb. Not found in any supermarket.
Farm-to-Door Transparency — Full provenance on every product. Farm, breed, age, slaughter date.
Same-Day Gauteng — Order before noon. Receive your meat the same day. Fresh, never frozen.
AI-Tracked Orders — Real-time WhatsApp updates from order to doorstep.
